error.signature: [WARN] Timer callback took longer than the timer period

verdict.summary: Timer callback execution time exceeds the timer period. Messages pile up and processing lags behind real time.

dead_ends.action: Decrease timer period to catch up on missed callbacks
dead_ends.why_fails: Makes the problem worse; callbacks pile up even faster

dead_ends.action: Add a sleep inside the callback to throttle
dead_ends.why_fails: sleep() blocks the executor, preventing all other callbacks from running

workarounds.action: Move heavy processing to a separate thread or process
workarounds.how: Use MultiThreadedExecutor with ReentrantCallbackGroup for parallelism

workarounds.action: Profile the callback and optimize the bottleneck
Increase timer period to match actual processing time
